LanguageData.nzasf.settings_enable_desc: Enable storage functionality for cloned furniture
LanguageData.nzasf.asf_not_detected: Adaptive Storage Framework: NOT DETECTED - Mod will not work!
LanguageData.nzasf.log_asf_missing: ASF Furniture Extension: Adaptive Storage Framework not detected! Please install ASF.
LanguageData.nzasf.log_cloning_start: ASF Furniture Extension: Cloning furniture with storage...
LanguageData.nzasf.log_cloning_disabled: ASF Furniture Extension: Cloning disabled in settings
LanguageData.nzasf.log_cloning_original_not_found: ASF Furniture Extension: Could not find original def {0}
LanguageData.nzasf.log_cloning_failed: ASF Furniture Extension: Failed to clone {0}: {1}
